overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a vibrant neon-lit downtown district. The character crosses intersections, passes under elevated highways, and navigates past futuristic vending machines and a security mech in a bustling cyberpunk city.

events.description: waiting for traffic light and beginning to cross the wide intersection
approaching the covered walkway under the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide plaza intersection toward the covered sidewalk area

entered.detail: massive digital advertising screens covering the buildings with bright neon colors
large concrete and metal highway structure spanning across the street ahead
tall modern skyscrapers with reflective glass facades
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a wide urban intersection surrounded by towering glass buildings and massive neon billboards. Crossing the asphalt crosswalk, they approach the entrance to a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway structure, with moderate pedestrian activity and sparse vehicle traffic visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with vending machines

events.description: passing a large security mech robot standing near vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and passing the security mech and vending machine area

notable_agents.action: large security mech standing stationary near the vending machines

entered.detail: large bipedal robotic security unit with mechanical arms and sensors
bright red and green vending machine with Burrito XXL branding
row of purple and red automated vending machines with digital displays
armed guard standing near a digital kiosk

segments.scene_description: Moving into the semi-covered walkway beneath the elevated highway, the character passes a stationary security mech and colorful vending machines including a Burrito XXL stand. The area is sheltered from direct sunlight with neon lighting, and a few security personnel are visible near the concrete pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with large advertisement walls

events.description: turning right to follow the sidewalk along the advertisement wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following a woman in a yellow jacket past the Nicola advertisement wall

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow jacket and red pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive wall covered with digital advertisements for Nicola and other brands
tall palm trees lining the street
modern street lighting poles along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area, the character walks along an open sidewalk bordered by a massive wall of digital advertisements for Nicola and other brands. Following a woman in a yellow jacket, the path continues past palm trees with moderate vehicle traffic visible on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with iconic corporate buildings

events.description: waiting at traffic light then crossing the intersection
entering the crosswalk and viewing the large building with 70 signage

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while observing the large corporate buildings with prominent signage

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large angular corporate building with prominent 70 logo on the facade
tall building with vertical 24 signage and Japanese characters
wide pedestrian crossing with white stripes
large golden statue visible near the intersection

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major intersection, the character waits for the traffic signal before crossing. The view opens up to reveal iconic corporate buildings including one with a large 70 sign and another with 24 signage, surrounded by moderate pedestrian and vehicle activity in the bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit urban intersection through a sheltered underpass and back into the bright midday sun of a corporate district. It begins by crossing an asphalt crosswalk surrounded by towering glass buildings and massive billboards before moving into the semi-covered walkway beneath an elevated highway. As the camera passes a stationary security mech and colorful vending machines, the lighting shifts from open sky to sheltered neon glows near concrete pillars. The scene then opens back onto a sunlit sidewalk bordered by a massive wall of digital advertisements and palm trees, following a woman in a yellow jacket along the street. Finally, the path leads to a major intersection where the view expands to reveal iconic corporate buildings with large numeric signage amidst a bustle of pedestrians and vehicles.
